svg.title: ESP32 DevKit V1 wiring diagram v2
svg.desc: Corrected wiring diagram: ESP32 DevKit V1 with SSD1306 OLED, HXJ8002 5-pin amp, speaker, and three buttons with pull-down resistors.
svg.text: Button logic: one leg to 5V rail, other leg to signal pin + 10kΩ to GND.
When released: pin reads LOW (0V via 10kΩ). When pressed: pin reads HIGH (5V).
